title: damasonium alisma subsp. bourgaei
intro: Damasonium alisma subsp. bourgaei, also known as Bourgaud's water plantain, is a subspecies of aquatic plant in the water plantain family. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic properties. The health benefits of Damasonium alisma subsp. bourgaei include its ability to relieve edema, reduce fever, and treat urinary tract infections. The plant is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and its medicinal properties are also utilized in the form of tinctures and salves.
